totalAssets.description: Raw underlying asset amount as a bigint string.

totalShares.description: Raw vault share supply as a bigint string.

lostAssets.description: Raw lost asset amount as a bigint string.

exchangeRate.description: Raw exchange rate as a bigint string.

totalSupplyUsd.description: Market USD number for total Earn vault assets.

availableAssets.description: Raw underlying asset amount as a bigint string.

availableAssetsUsd.description: Market USD number for currently available assets.

supplyApy.description: Public supply APY as a percent number.

apyCurrent.description: Current public APY as a percent number.

apy7d.description: Seven-day public APY as a percent number.

apy30d.description: Thirty-day public APY as a percent number.

apy90d.description: Ninety-day public APY as a percent number.
